meaning: n.[纺]开士米,山羊绒,羊绒,开士米织物,开士米绒线
examples: Amy had bought a soft, jade green cashmere jacket for Helen.
Her wardrobe consists primarily of huge cashmere sweaters and tiny Italian sandals.
It has the advantages of both cashmere and mulberry silk.
Just as not all wool is cashmere, not all titanium is the best titanium.
But CASHMERE was grandfathered under an earlier version of that policy, which allowed a two-year period.
